title: willoughbya glomerata
intro: Willoughbya glomerata, also known as the woolly heads, is a plant species native to Australia and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Willoughbya glomerata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, but its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
